<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1380 860" width="1380" height="860" font-family="Arial, sans-serif">

  <rect width="1380" height="860" fill="#f7f8fc"/>

  <!-- TITLE -->
  <text x="554" y="26" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#1a1a2e" letter-spacing="0.2">RF-Based UAV Signal Classification — System Architecture</text>
  <line x1="20" y1="33" x2="1080" y2="33" stroke="#c0c8d8" stroke-width="1"/>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arr"   markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3.5" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3.5,0 7" fill="#445566"/></marker>
    <marker id="arrT"  markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3.5" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3.5,0 7" fill="#1a6060"/></marker>
    <marker id="arrO"  markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3.5" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3.5,0 7" fill="#a06800"/></marker>

    <!-- Clip paths -->
    <clipPath id="cpSTFT">    <rect x="488" y="42"  width="198" height="80" rx="3"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="cpSpecFull"><rect x="1091" y="52" width="278" height="152" rx="4"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="cpCNN">     <rect x="22"  y="156" width="524" height="295" rx="4"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="cpVim">     <rect x="556" y="156" width="520" height="295" rx="4"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="cpSwin">    <rect x="22"  y="490" width="524" height="296" rx="4"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="cpViT">     <rect x="556" y="490" width="520" height="296" rx="4"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="cpConf">    <rect x="1093" y="431" width="260" height="190" rx="4"/></clipPath>
  </defs>


  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <!-- TOP PIPELINE STRIP  y=38 → y=128  (Raw IQ → Preproc → STFT) -->
  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

  <!-- Box 1: Raw I/Q Data  x=20, w=148 -->
  <rect x="20" y="38" width="148" height="86" rx="7" fill="#d6efe2" stroke="#2a7a4a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="20" y="38" width="148" height="20" rx="7" fill="#2a7a4a"/>
  <rect x="20" y="48"  width="148" height="10" fill="#2a7a4a"/>
  <text x="94" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.3">RAW I/Q DATA</text>
  <text x="94" y="72" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#1a3a20">I(t) + jQ(t)</text>
  <text x="94" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#444">Complex RF Signal</text>
  <text x="94" y="98" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#2a7a4a" font-style="italic">In-phase / Quadrature</text>
  <text x="94" y="112" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#1a5030">SDR / IQ Recording</text>
  <line x1="168" y1="81" x2="184" y2="81" stroke="#445566" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Box 2: Preprocessing  x=186, w=188 -->
  <rect x="186" y="38" width="188" height="86" rx="7" fill="#d6efe2" stroke="#2a7a4a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="186" y="38" width="188" height="20" rx="7" fill="#2a7a4a"/>
  <rect x="186" y="48"  width="188" height="10" fill="#2a7a4a"/>
  <text x="280" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.3">PREPROCESSING</text>
  <text x="196" y="69" font-size="8" fill="#1a3a20" font-weight="bold">① DC Offset Removal</text>
  <text x="196" y="81" font-size="8" fill="#1a3a20" font-weight="bold">② I/Q Imbalance Correction</text>
  <text x="196" y="93" font-size="8" fill="#1a3a20" font-weight="bold">③ Noise Injection (AWGN)</text>
  <text x="196" y="105" font-size="8" fill="#1a3a20" font-weight="bold">④ Segmentation (L, Hop H)</text>
  <text x="196" y="117" font-size="7.5" fill="#555" font-style="italic">  Gram-Schmidt · Kaiser β</text>
  <line x1="374" y1="81" x2="390" y2="81" stroke="#445566" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Box 3: STFT — with embedded spectrogram image  x=392, w=296 -->
  <rect x="392" y="38" width="664" height="86" rx="7" fill="#fff3dc" stroke="#a06800" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="392" y="38" width="664" height="20" rx="7" fill="#a06800"/>
  <rect x="392" y="48"  width="664" height="10" fill="#a06800"/>
  <text x="724" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.3">STFT — SPECTROGRAM GENERATION</text>
  <!-- Text labels left side -->
  <text x="402" y="70" font-size="8" fill="#4a2800" font-weight="bold">① Windowed FFT · Kaiser β · N_FFT bins · Max Norm.</text>
  <text x="402" y="82" font-size="8" fill="#4a2800" font-weight="bold">② Log-scale · 10·log₁₀(P+ε) · Viridis Colormap (8-bit)</text>
  <text x="402" y="94" font-size="8" fill="#4a2800" font-weight="bold">③ Freq Flip + Percentile Norm. · [p_min, p_max] clip</text>
  <text x="402" y="106" font-size="8" fill="#4a2800" font-weight="bold">④ Sliding Window W_time, Stride S_time → 2D Frames</text>
  <!-- STFT spectrogram image right side -->
  <rect x="487" y="42" width="562" height="78" rx="3" fill="#111"/>
  <image href="data:image/png;base64,"
         x="488" y="42" width="560" height="78"
         clip-path="url(#cpSTFT)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice"/>
  <text x="490" y="119" font-size="6.5" fill="#a06800" font-style="italic">f (MHz) ↑  ·  t (ms) →  ·  Power (dB, normalised)  ·  Shape: 100 segs × 2048 freq bins</text>

  <!-- Arrow: STFT → Spectrogram (diagonal to top-right box) -->
  <line x1="1058" y1="70" x2="1084" y2="90" stroke="#a06800" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrO)" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
  <text x="1046" y="64" font-size="7.5" fill="#a06800" font-weight="bold">224×224</text>

  <!-- Down arrow pipeline → modelling -->
  <line x1="540" y1="124" x2="540" y2="132" stroke="#445566" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>


  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <!-- SPECTROGRAM OUTPUT — TOP RIGHT CORNER  x=1086, y=38      -->
  <!-- Full spectrogram image, large and fully visible           -->
  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <rect x="1086" y="38" width="274" height="206" rx="8" fill="#fff3dc" stroke="#c07800" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="1086" y="38" width="274" height="20" rx="8" fill="#c07800"/>
  <rect x="1086" y="48"  width="274" height="10" fill="#c07800"/>
  <text x="1223" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.3">224 × 224 SPECTROGRAM OUTPUT</text>
  <!-- Full spectrogram image — large -->
  <rect x="1090" y="60" width="270" height="170" rx="4" fill="#111"/>
  <image href="data:image/png;base64,"
         x="1091" y="61" width="268" height="168"
         clip-path="url(#cpSpecFull)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice"/>
  <!-- Axis labels overlaid on image -->
  <text x="1096" y="225" font-size="7.5" fill="#c07800" font-weight="bold">f ↑</text>
  <text x="1340" y="225" font-size="7.5" fill="#c07800" font-weight="bold">t →</text>
  <text x="1223" y="238" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#7a4000" font-style="italic">Lanczos Resize · PNG · RGB · ImageNet Normalised</text>


  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <!-- MODEL 2×2 GRID   x=20, y=136, w=1060, h=686             -->
  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <rect x="20" y="136" width="1060" height="686" rx="10" fill="#f0ebf8" stroke="#5535a0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="550" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#3a1a70" letter-spacing="1">③  MODELLING  —  Deep Learning Classifiers</text>

  <!-- Grid lines -->
  <line x1="550" y1="154" x2="550" y2="820" stroke="#b090d8" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="22"  y1="480" x2="1078" y2="480" stroke="#b090d8" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>

  <!-- ── CELL A: CNN  top-left ── -->
  <rect x="22"  y="154" width="526" height="22" rx="4" fill="#5535a0"/>
  <text x="285" y="169" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.4">CNN  —  Convolutional Neural Networks</text>
  <rect x="22"  y="176" width="526" height="288" fill="white"/>
  <image href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
         x="23" y="177" width="524" height="286"
         clip-path="url(#cpCNN)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  <rect x="22"  y="464" width="526" height="16" fill="#ede8f8" stroke="#c0a8e8" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="285" y="476" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#2e0a60">VGG16  ·  MobileNet  ·  EfficientNet  ·  Xception</text>

  <!-- ── CELL B: Vision Mamba  top-right ── -->
  <rect x="552" y="154" width="526" height="22" rx="4" fill="#6840b8"/>
  <text x="815" y="169" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.4">VISION MAMBA  —  State Space Model (SSM)</text>
  <rect x="552" y="176" width="526" height="288" fill="white"/>
  <image href="data:image/png;base64,"
         x="553" y="177" width="524" height="286"
         clip-path="url(#cpVim)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  <rect x="552" y="464" width="526" height="16" fill="#e8e0f8" stroke="#8865c8" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="815" y="476" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#3a1a70">Vision Mamba (ViM)  ·  Bidirectional SSM  ·  O(N) Complexity</text>

  <!-- ── CELL C: Swin-Tiny  bottom-left ── -->
  <rect x="22"  y="482" width="526" height="22" rx="4" fill="#3050a0"/>
  <text x="285" y="497" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.4">TRANSFORMER  —  Swin Transformer</text>
  <rect x="22"  y="504" width="526" height="298" fill="white"/>
  <image href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
         x="23" y="505" width="524" height="294"
         clip-path="url(#cpSwin)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  <rect x="22"  y="802" width="526" height="18" fill="#dde4f5" stroke="#a0b0d8" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="285" y="815" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#0a2060">Swin-Tiny  ·  Shifted-Window Self-Attention  ·  Hierarchical Features</text>

  <!-- ── CELL D: ViT-Small  bottom-right ── -->
  <rect x="552" y="482" width="526" height="22" rx="4" fill="#2060a0"/>
  <text x="815" y="497" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.4">TRANSFORMER  —  Vision Transformer</text>
  <rect x="552" y="504" width="526" height="298" fill="white"/>
  <image href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
         x="553" y="505" width="524" height="294"
         clip-path="url(#cpViT)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  <rect x="552" y="802" width="526" height="18" fill="#dde4f5" stroke="#a0b0d8" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="815" y="815" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#0a2060">ViT-Small  ·  Global Multi-Head Self-Attention  ·  Patch Tokens</text>

  <!-- Dataset strip -->
  <rect x="22" y="820" width="1056" height="0" fill="white"/>
  <text x="550" y="826" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#555">Datasets: VTI_DroneSET · DroneRF · Hovering UAV RF · Noisy Drone v2</text>

  <!-- Arrow: models → eval -->
  <line x1="1082" y1="530" x2="1083" y2="530" stroke="#445566" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>


  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <!-- EVALUATION & RESULTS  x=1086, y=248, w=274, h=574        -->
  <!-- Sits BELOW the spectrogram output box                     -->
  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <rect x="1086" y="248" width="274" height="574" rx="10" fill="#e4f0f0" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="1098" y="263" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#0a4040" letter-spacing="0.8">④  EVALUATION &amp; RESULTS</text>

  <!-- Arrow eval entry -->
  <line x1="1086" y1="530" x2="1089" y2="530" stroke="#445566" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Classification Predictions -->
  <rect x="1092" y="267" width="262" height="32" rx="5" fill="white" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2"/>
  <rect x="1092" y="267" width="4" height="32" rx="2" fill="#1a6060"/>
  <text x="1222" y="281" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#0a2020">Classification Predictions</text>
  <text x="1222" y="293" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#1a6060" font-weight="bold">Multi Task Classification</text>
  <line x1="1222" y1="299" x2="1222" y2="308" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrT)"/>

  <!-- Metrics -->
  <rect x="1092" y="310" width="262" height="16" rx="4" fill="#1a6060"/>
  <text x="1222" y="322" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Classification Metrics</text>
  <rect x="1092" y="326" width="262" height="76" rx="0,0,5,5" fill="white" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2"/>

  <!-- 2×2 metric cards -->
  <rect x="1097" y="330" width="122" height="34" rx="4" fill="#eaf5ee" stroke="#2a7a4a" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="1158" y="343" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#1a5030">Accuracy</text>
  <text x="1158" y="354" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#555">(TP+TN)/Total</text>
  <text x="1158" y="362" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6.5" fill="#2a7a4a" font-weight="bold">Overall Correct Rate</text>

  <rect x="1225" y="330" width="123" height="34" rx="4" fill="#e8f0f8" stroke="#2060a0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="1286" y="343" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#0a3060">F1 Score</text>
  <text x="1286" y="354" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#555">2·P·R/(P+R)</text>
  <text x="1286" y="362" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6.5" fill="#2060a0" font-weight="bold">Precision-Recall Balance</text>

  <rect x="1097" y="368" width="122" height="30" rx="4" fill="#fef3ea" stroke="#c06020" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="1158" y="381" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#7a3000">FPR</text>
  <text x="1158" y="392" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#555">FP/(FP+TN)  ·  False Alarm</text>

  <rect x="1225" y="368" width="123" height="30" rx="4" fill="#fdeaea" stroke="#b03030" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="1286" y="381" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#7a0000">FNR</text>
  <text x="1286" y="392" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#555">FN/(FN+TP)  ·  Miss Detect.</text>

  <line x1="1222" y1="403" x2="1222" y2="412" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrT)"/>

  <!-- Confusion Matrix — FULL, tall enough to show completely -->
  <rect x="1092" y="414" width="262" height="16" rx="4" fill="#1a6060"/>
  <text x="1222" y="426" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Confusion Matrix</text>
  <rect x="1092" y="430" width="262" height="192" rx="0,0,5,5" fill="white" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2"/>
  <image href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
         x="1093" y="431" width="260" height="190"
         clip-path="url(#cpConf)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>

  <line x1="1222" y1="623" x2="1222" y2="632" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrT)"/>

  <!-- Explainability — compact -->
  <rect x="1092" y="634" width="262" height="16" rx="4" fill="#1a6060"/>
  <text x="1222" y="646" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Explainability</text>
  <rect x="1092" y="650" width="262" height="100" rx="0,0,5,5" fill="white" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2"/>

  <!-- Grad-CAM mini -->
  <rect x="1098" y="656" width="50" height="36" rx="3" fill="#e0e0e0"/>
  <ellipse cx="1123" cy="670" rx="16" ry="9" fill="#e05010" opacity="0.58"/>
  <ellipse cx="1112" cy="680" rx="9"  ry="6" fill="#e02010" opacity="0.38"/>
  <ellipse cx="1136" cy="661" rx="8"  ry="5" fill="#e08020" opacity="0.42"/>
  <text x="1123" y="698" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" fill="#888">Grad-CAM</text>
  <text x="1154" y="663" font-size="7.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#0a4040">Grad-CAM</text>
  <text x="1154" y="674" font-size="7" fill="#444">▸ Spatial attribution on spect.</text>
  <text x="1154" y="684" font-size="7" fill="#444">▸ Discriminative freq. bands</text>
  <text x="1154" y="694" font-size="7" fill="#444">▸ Per-model interpretability</text>

  <!-- t-SNE mini -->
  <rect x="1098" y="702" width="50" height="38" rx="3" fill="#f5f5f5" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="1108" cy="710" r="2.8" fill="#3060b0" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1115" cy="706" r="2.8" fill="#3060b0" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1106" cy="718" r="2.8" fill="#3060b0" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1132" cy="708" r="2.8" fill="#2a7a3a" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1140" cy="716" r="2.8" fill="#2a7a3a" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1128" cy="722" r="2.8" fill="#2a7a3a" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1116" cy="730" r="2.8" fill="#b05020" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1124" cy="726" r="2.8" fill="#b05020" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="1110" cy="736" r="2.8" fill="#b05020" opacity="0.85"/>
  <text x="1154" y="712" font-size="7.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#0a4040">t-SNE Latent Space</text>
  <text x="1154" y="723" font-size="7" fill="#444">▸ Class-cluster separation</text>
  <text x="1154" y="733" font-size="7" fill="#444">▸ SNR robustness coding</text>
  <text x="1154" y="743" font-size="7" fill="#444">▸ Cross-model embedding</text>

  <line x1="1222" y1="752" x2="1222" y2="761" stroke="#1a6060" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrT)"/>

  <!-- Softmax output -->
  <rect x="1092" y="763" width="262" height="52" rx="6" fill="#3a1a70" stroke="#5535a0" stroke-width="1.2"/>
  <text x="1222" y="782" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Softmax → Predicted Label</text>
  <text x="1222" y="796" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#c8b8e8">Drone Type · Flight Mode</text>
  <text x="1222" y="808" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#c8b8e8">Drone Count · Multi-Task Output</text>


  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <!-- CAPTION -->
  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <line x1="20" y1="842" x2="1360" y2="842" stroke="#c0c8d8" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="690" y="855" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#555" font-style="italic">Fig. 1. RF-Based UAV Detection and Classification: Raw I/Q → Preprocessing → STFT Spectrogram (224×224) → Modelling (CNN · Swin · ViT · Vision Mamba) → Evaluation</text>

</svg>
